channel.title: Research on NTU IoT Sensing Group
channel.description: Recent content in Research on NTU IoT Sensing Group

item.title: LoRa
item.description: Resilient LoRa Networks Attack-Aware Data Timestamping in Low-Power Synchronization-Free LoRaWAN. One-hop Out-of-band Control Planes for Multi-hop Wireless Sensor Networks. LoRa-Based Localization: Opportunities and Challenges. One-Hop Out-of-Band Control Planes for Low-Power Multi-Hop Wireless Networks.

item.title: Privacy-Preserving ML in IoT
item.description: Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning in IoT Challenges of Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning in IoT. Lightweight and Unobtrusive Data Obfuscation at IoT Edge for Remote Inference. On Lightweight Privacy-Preserving Collaborative Learning for Internet-of-Things Objects. Differentially Private Collaborative Learning for the IoT Edge.

item.title: IoT Adversarial Examples
item.description: Resilient IoT Edge against Adversarial Examples Moving Target Defense for Embedded Deep Visual Sensing against Adversarial Examples.

item.title: Acoustic Sensing
item.description: AI-Empowered Acoustic Sensing Deep Room Recognition Using Inaudible Echos.

item.title: Data Centers
item.description: Thermal, Energy, and Computation Management for Data Centers Control of Air Free-Cooled Data Centers in Tropics via Deep Reinforcement Learning. A Testbed and Data Yields for Studying Data Center Energy Efficiency and Reliability.
